name: Orange Pistachio Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 package 3.5 oz. instant pistachio pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
------------------------------------CAKE------------------------------------
1. In a large bowl, combine the cake mix, eggs, orange juice, cooking oil, and pistachio pudding.
Blend at low speed for 1 minute, then on high speed for 3 minutes.
2. Pour 2/3 of the batter into a greased and floured 12-cup Bundt pan.
3. Add chocolate syrup to the remaining 1/3 of the batter and mix at medium speed until blended.
4. Pour the mixture over the top of the batter in the pan. Cut through the batter with a knife to marbleize.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
6. Cool the cake in the pan for 10-15 minutes. Turn out onto a wire rack.
7. Once cool, drizzle with chocolate glaze.
---------------------------------------------CHOCOLATE GLAZE------------------------------
2 cups Sifted confectioners' sugar
2 tablespoons Cocoa
1 tablespoon Soft butter
1/2 teaspoon Vanilla
1-4 tablespoons Milk (adjust to desired consistency)
Combine the sugar, cocoa, and butter in a small bowl. Gradually add vanilla and milk until the glaze reaches the desired thickness. Stir until smooth.
Source: TPA Trib, 2/23/95
